creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter:  On http://www.freebsd.org/releases/index.html I can see a 
reference to FreeBSD 7.0 (in the "Current Releases" section at the top 
of the page).  All of the links from that entry also work for me. How do 
you mean that it is "missing"?
